text:
small typo in pkg-descr

$ head -2 pkg-descr 
Universal Media Server (UMS) is a feature-rich DLNA/UPnP home media
server good support for client devices.

Should be:
Universal Media Server (UMS) is a feature-rich DLNA/UPnP home media
server, with good support for client devices.
      ^^^^^^
